---
title: "Publications"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
citation: false
---


## Published

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-title}
Evaluating Fine-Scale Air-Quality Heterogeneity Using a Low-Cost Multipollutant Sensor Network in Twin Cities, Minnesota
:::
::: {.pub-authors}
[**A. Yatawara**]{.me} et al.
:::
::: {.pub-venue}
ACS ES&T Air, 2025
:::
::: {.pub-links}
[Paper](https://pubs.acs.org/doi/abs/10.1021/acsestair.5c00439)
:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-title}
Income-Based Exposure Disparities Across California Counties, 2000–2023: A Generalizable Statistical Framework
:::
::: {.pub-authors}
[**A. Yatawara**]{.me}, K. Ko, C. Rodriguez
:::
::: {.pub-venue}
Environmental Research: Health, 2025
:::
::: {.pub-links}
[Paper](https://iopscience.iop.org/article/10.1088/2752-5309/ae4134/meta)
:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-title}
WIP: Structured AI Tutoring in Engineering Education
:::
::: {.pub-authors}
A. Cruz, [**A. Yatawara**]{.me}, et al.
:::
::: {.pub-venue}
IEEE Frontiers in Education Conference (FIE), 2025
:::
::: {.pub-links}
[Paper](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/abstract/document/11328293)
:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-title}
Computer-Aided Instruction for K–12 Teachers: A Cognitive Apprenticeship Approach to LLM Integration
:::
::: {.pub-authors}
A. Cruz, [**A. Yatawara**]{.me}, et al.
:::
::: {.pub-venue}
IEEE Frontiers in Education Conference (FIE), 2025
:::
:::


## Under Review

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-title}
From Answer Generators to Thinking Partners: Scaffolded LLM Tutors in Statistics Education
:::
::: {.pub-authors}
[**A. Yatawara**]{.me}, J. Wang, A. Cruz, M. Mishra
:::
::: {.pub-venue}
Submitted to Journal of Statistics and Data Science Education (JSDSE), 2025
:::
:::


## Conference Proceedings

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-title}
A Multiplicative Factor Multi-Frequency Exponential GARCH Model
:::
::: {.pub-authors}
[**A. Yatawara**]{.me}, V.A. Samaranayake
:::
::: {.pub-venue}
JSM Proceedings — Business and Economic Statistics Section, 2022
:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-title}
An Asymmetric Hyperbolic Generalized Autoregressive Conditional Heteroscedastic Model
:::
::: {.pub-authors}
[**A. Yatawara**]{.me}, V.A. Samaranayake
:::
::: {.pub-venue}
JSM Proceedings — Business and Economic Statistics Section, 2021
:::
:::


## Dissertation

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-title}
The Multiplicative Factor Multi-Frequency Exponential GARCH ((MF)²EGARCH)
:::
::: {.pub-authors}
[**A. Yatawara**]{.me}
:::
::: {.pub-venue}
Ph.D. Dissertation, Missouri University of Science and Technology, 2023
:::
::: {.pub-links}
[ProQuest](https://www.proquest.com/openview/964c28fd3197a880e84e510d38de2daa/1?pq-origsite=gscholar&cbl=18750&diss=y)
:::
:::


## Working Papers

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-title}
The Shape of Volatility Memory: Sub-Exponential ARCH(∞) Kernels Across 100+ Financial Assets [In production]{.badge-inprogress}
:::
::: {.pub-authors}
[**A. Yatawara**]{.me}
:::
::: {.pub-venue}
Target: Journal of Business & Economic Statistics
:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-title}
MF2V-GARCH: Augmenting Multi-Factor Volatility with Smoothed Trading Volume [In production]{.badge-inprogress}
:::
::: {.pub-authors}
[**A. Yatawara**]{.me}
:::
::: {.pub-venue}
Target: Journal of Forecasting
:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-title}
MF2-GARCH-A: Volatility Modelling with a Sign-Sensitive Long-Run Component [Near completion]{.badge-inprogress}
:::
::: {.pub-authors}
[**A. Yatawara**]{.me}, V.A. Samaranayake
:::
::: {.pub-venue}
Target: International Journal of Forecasting
:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-title}
The Multiplicative Factor Multi-Frequency Exponential GARCH (MF2-EGARCH) [Near completion]{.badge-inprogress}
:::
::: {.pub-authors}
[**A. Yatawara**]{.me}, V.A. Samaranayake
:::
::: {.pub-venue}
Target: International Journal of Forecasting
:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-title}
Multiple Regime Hyperbolic GARCH (MR-HYGARCH): A Regime-Switching Asymmetric Long-Memory Model [Near completion]{.badge-inprogress}
:::
::: {.pub-authors}
[**A. Yatawara**]{.me}, V.A. Samaranayake
:::
::: {.pub-venue}
Target: TBD
:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
::: {.pub-title}
Improving Influenza Forecasting: A GRU-CNN Hybrid Model with Yeo-Johnson Scaling [In preparation]{.badge-inprogress}
:::
::: {.pub-authors}
[**A. Yatawara**]{.me}, N. Gallego, I. Ratnayake
:::
::: {.pub-venue}
Target: TBD
:::
:::


## Selected Presentations

| Year | Title | Venue |
|------|-------|-------|
| 2025 | Hybrid LSTM Deep Learning Model for Forecasting Influenza-Like Illnesses | JSM, Nashville, TN (Contributed Paper) |
| 2025 | Findings from ELEVATE | AI in Education Day, UC Berkeley (Invited Panel) |
| 2025 | Build Your AI Teaching Assistant | NextTech Kern (Session Lead) |
| 2022 | A Multiplicative Factor Multi-Frequency Exponential GARCH Model | JSM, Washington DC (Contributed Paper) |
| 2021 | The Asymmetric Hyperbolic GARCH Model | JSM Virtual (Speed Presentation) |
